title: Assistant Store Manager - Heritage Foods Retail - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Heritage Foods Retail - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Heritage Foods Retail is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Heritage Foods Retail:
Heritage Foods Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Heritage Foods Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
